title: aeschynanthus gesneriflorus
intro: Aeschynanthus gesneriflorus, also known as the Goldfish Plant or Lipstick Plant, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Gesneriaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus gesneriflorus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
